---
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# {{ site.title }}

> This site hosts the full text of {% assign all = site.articles %}{{ all | size }} academic articles by {{ site.author.name }}.

All article pages render the complete article text directly in HTML (no JavaScript rendering required) and include Schema.org ScholarlyArticle JSON-LD, Google Scholar `citation_*` meta tags, Dublin Core, and Open Graph metadata.

{% assign articles = site.articles | sort: "date" | reverse %}
## Articles

{% for article in articles %}- [{{ article.title }}]({{ article.url | absolute_url }}): {{ article.journal }}, {{ article.year }}
{% endfor %}

## Resources

- [Full-text corpus]({{ '/llms-full.txt' | absolute_url }}): All articles concatenated as plain text — use this for single-request LLM ingestion of the full publication record
- [Sitemap]({{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}): XML sitemap listing all pages
- [Atom feed]({{ '/feed/articles.xml' | absolute_url }}): Atom feed of all articles with abstracts

## Optional

- [Author ORCID](https://orcid.org/{{ site.author.orcid }}): Authoritative author identifier and external publication list
